title: Chewy Sour Sourdough Stir-fry
description: A nutritious and flavorful meal-prep Norwegian dish featuring sourdough bread as a base with ground allspice for added depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Sourdough Bread
ingredients.notes: Optional, use whole grain if preferred.

ingredients.name: Allspice Powder
ingredients.notes: Grind for a more intense flavor.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Broth
ingredients.notes: Low sodium or homemade vegetable broth for health and safety.

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: To enhance the savory taste of the dish.

ingredients.name: Flaxseed Meal
ingredients.notes: Can be used as a binding agent and to make the dish chewy.

instructions: Soak the sourdough bread in vegetable broth for about 5 minutes, then squeeze out excess liquid.
In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except salt. Mix well until you achieve a thick and savory paste.
If needed, add a pinch of salt to taste and mix again.
Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat and spread the mixture evenly across the pan.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes on each side or until golden brown spots appear and it's firm to the touch.
Serve with your favorite vegetables, such as steamed broccoli or roasted carrots.
